ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "geoid" TEXT /* Geographical identifier for the region */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pollutant */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the measurement unit */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual entry, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geoid", "pollutant_id", "timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "geoid" TEXT /* Geographical identifier that links to environmental data */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geoid")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the pollutant (e.g., greenhouse gas, particulate matter) */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Impact level of the pollutant (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "regulatory_standard" TEXT /* Regulatory standards or limits for the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., ppm, mg/m3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for unit conversions */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Shorthand symbol for the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "geoid" TEXT /* Geographical identifier for the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_geoid FOREIGN KEY ("geoid") REFERENCES locations ("geoid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report contents */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, ad-hoc) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the generated report */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
